description: A landscape painting showing a group of bare birch trees standing in or near floodwater during what appears to be a spring thaw. The slender white trunks are reflected in the still golden-brown water. The sky is a soft gradient from warm gold near the horizon to pale lavender above. A few birds fly in the distance. The overall tone is warm and golden, with the skeletal trees creating delicate vertical patterns against the luminous sky and water.
